🏢 FIRM PROFILE.company_tagline: Fast payouts, flexible rules, and 90% profit splits

💰 PRICING & OFFERS.pricing_model: One-time flat fee (non-refundable, no monthly rebilling)

commission_structure.note: Commissions vary by broker (DXFeed/Tradovate); check platform pricing directly

active_promotions: 50% OFF on Sprint and Instant accounts (Ends: Apr 21, 2026)
💰 PRICING & OFFERS.refund_policy: Non-refundable one-time fee; no monthly billing

📊 CHALLENGE MODELS.description: Traditional 1-step evaluation with profit target and EOD trailing drawdown

account_sizes.consistency_note: Eval: 50% cap on single day profit; Funded: 30% cap

📊 CHALLENGE MODELS.description: 1-step evaluation with lower pricing; consistency rule only applies after funding

account_sizes.consistency_note: Funded accounts only; none during eval

📊 CHALLENGE MODELS.description: No evaluation; start funded immediately with profit cap on single days

account_sizes.daily_loss_limit_note: Max profit per day capped at 5% of account balance
account_sizes.consistency_note: Single day profit cannot exceed 20% of total profit

funded_account.payout_frequency: On-demand after meeting winning day requirements
funded_account.first_payout_requirement: Varies by account type (EOD: 7 winning days; Sprint: 5 winning days; Instant: 10 days min with 7 winning days)
funded_account.scaling_program: Every 15 calendar days with 2.5% growth → +1 mini contract, +$500 drawdown. Max: 9 minis

🏆 AGGREGATE METRICS.difficulty_reasoning: EOD drawdown; consistency rules vary by account type; Instant has 5% daily profit cap and 20% total consistency rule
🏆 AGGREGATE METRICS.best_suited_for: Traders who prefer EOD drawdown; those seeking flexible challenge options; users of TradingView, NinjaTrader, or Tradovate
🏆 AGGREGATE METRICS.worst_suited_for: Scalpers (micro scalping banned); HFT traders; residents of restricted countries
🏆 AGGREGATE METRICS.key_strength: Multiple challenge types; EOD drawdown; 90% profit split; scaling plan
🏆 AGGREGATE METRICS.key_weakness: Very new (2024); no reviews; micro scalping prohibited; restricted countries include Hong Kong and Singapore

red_flags.detail: Less than 18 months old. No Trustpilot reviews. Long-term track record unknown.
Trades held for seconds or fractions of a point are banned. Scalping allowed; micro scalping is not.

red_flags.flag: News Trading Restrictions on Funded Accounts
red_flags.detail: 2-minute buffer around high-impact news on funded accounts.
Includes Hong Kong (HQ), Japan, Singapore, South Korea, Russia, and others.
No AI bots, fully automated systems, or hands-free trading.

💡 PRO TIPS FOR TRADERS: Current promotion: 50% OFF on Sprint and Instant accounts (ends Apr 21, 2026)
EOD accounts offer the highest contract limits (12 minis on 150K)
Scaling program adds +1 mini contract every 15 days if you grow 2.5%
Sprint accounts have lower pricing and no consistency rule during evaluation
Micro scalping is strictly prohibited—ensure trades are held for minutes, not seconds
News trading is allowed during evaluation but restricted on funded accounts (2-minute buffer)
Maximum of 5 funded accounts allowed across all challenge types

⚖️ COMPETITIVE POSITIONING.vs_lucid: Goat: Founded 2024 (Hong Kong), EOD/Sprint/Instant models, 90% split, scaling program. Lucid: Founded 2025 (US), 4 models, 90% split, 15-min payouts.
⚖️ COMPETITIVE POSITIONING.vs_topstep: Goat: One-time fee, Hong Kong-based, limited track record. Topstep: Subscription model, US-based, 14 years history.
⚖️ COMPETITIVE POSITIONING.vs_apex: Goat: EOD only drawdown, no daily loss limits on some models, strict micro scalping ban. Apex: Choice of EOD/intraday, more flexible scalping.
⚖️ COMPETITIVE POSITIONING.unique_advantage: Multiple distinct challenge models (EOD/Sprint/Instant); scaling program increases drawdown alongside contracts; EOD trailing drawdown only
